purpose: home_vocab 시리즈 메인 캐릭터의 '기본 사진(베이스 레퍼런스)'을 Supabase DB에 저장 — 나중에 AI가 꺼내서 일관된 포즈 변형 생성에 재사용하기 위함

characters.identity: long brown hair (key feature), navy-white sailor school uniform, red neckerchief, navy pleated skirt, knee socks
characters.style: minimalist 2D line art, thick black outlines, light beige background (#F5F5F0)

characters.identity: short neat black hair (key feature), casual short-sleeve t-shirt and pants (no school uniform)
characters.style: minimalist 2D line art, thick black outlines, light beige background (#F5F5F0)
